decision_lane.name: real-physics-engine
decision_lane.use_when: The task needs rigid bodies, colliders, constraints, spatial queries, or continuous collision detection rather than tuning the existing flight integrator.
decision_lane.not_for: Thrust feel, damping, pointer controls, chase camera smoothing, HUD feedback, or other feel-only changes.

primary_candidate.name: rapier.js
primary_candidate.role: Preferred first research candidate for modern 3D rigid bodies/colliders in this TypeScript + Three.js project.

secondary_candidate.name: cannon-es
secondary_candidate.role: Lighter pure TypeScript/JavaScript option with high adoption signal but older repository push activity.

later_lugos_import.reason: Research lane only; no engine dependency is installed and no simulation architecture has been selected.
required_before_import: Decide whether real dynamics are needed for newman.foo.
Compare bundle/runtime cost against the existing budget gates.
Prototype one minimal adapter behind src/core or a new physics boundary.
Choose Rapier, cannon-es, or another engine with explicit acceptance criteria.
